{
  "title": "Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's How to Get It Back in 60 Seconds",
  "meta_description": "Landlord not returning your deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legal demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99. No signup or subscription required.",
  "content_outline": [
    "Why landlords wrongfully withhold security deposits",
    "What landlords can and cannot deduct from your deposit",
    "Tenant rights: state timelines and legal requirements",
    "How to write a security deposit dispute letter that actually works",
    "Get your money back in 60 seconds with Deposits-Back.com"
  ],
  "key_points": [
    "Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14-45 days",
    "Normal wear and tear cannot be legally deducted from your deposit",
    "A formal demand letter is often the fastest way to recover your money",
    "Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific letters for $19.99 with no signup"
  ],
  "cta": "Stop waiting. Get your security deposit back in 60 seconds for just $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com — no sign-up, no subscription, just results.",
  "target_audience": "Frustrated US renters whose landlords are wrongfully withholding or deducting from their security deposits",
  "word_count_target": 800,
  "social_hooks": [
    {
      "platform": "TikTok/Reels",
      "hook_text": "POV: You cleaned everything but your landlord still kept your $2,000 deposit...",
      "script": "You scrubbed the floors. You filled the nail holes. But your landlord just ghosted you on your security deposit. Here is the truth: they cannot keep it for normal wear and tear. And you do not need a lawyer to fight back. For $19.99, Deposits-Back.com writes and sends a legal demand letter in 60 seconds. No signup. No subscription. Tap the link.",
      "target_keyword": "landlord withholding security deposit",
      "visual_direction": "Split screen: clean apartment vs. angry text messages from landlord"
    },
    {
      "platform": "TikTok/Reels",
      "hook_text": "My landlord said 'I'll mail it next week' for 3 months straight...",
      "script": "If your landlord is processing your deposit for months, they are hoping you will give up. Do not. Most states give them 14 to 30 days max. After that, they are breaking the law. Stop texting. Start demanding. Go to Deposits-Back.com, answer a few questions, and send a formal demand letter in under a minute. $19.99. Your move, landlord.",
      "target_keyword": "landlord not returning deposit",
      "visual_direction": "Green screen over fake landlord texts with escalating frustration"
    },
    {
      "platform": "TikTok/Reels",
      "hook_text": "This is how I got my $1,800 deposit back after my landlord said 'no'...",
      "script": "Texting your landlord is not working. Neither is that passive-aggressive email draft. What actually works? A certified demand letter from Deposits-Back.com. It takes 60 seconds. Costs less than a pizza delivery. And tells your landlord you know your rights. My landlord paid me 5 days later. Link in bio to get yours.",
      "target_keyword": "my landlord won't give me my deposit back",
      "visual_direction": "Before/after bank account balance with text overlay"
    },
    {
      "platform": "TikTok/Reels",
      "hook_text": "Can your landlord actually keep your deposit for 'cleaning'? Let's find out...",
      "script": "Spoiler alert: they cannot charge you for normal wear and tear or routine cleaning. If they deducted $500 for scuffs on the wall, that is probably illegal. Know your tenant rights. Then enforce them with a demand letter from Deposits-Back.com. 60 seconds. $19.99. No
